title: Figure 5 from: Gunaseelan S, Kezo K, Karunarathna SC, Yang E, Zhao C, Elgorban AM, Tibpromma S, Kaliyaperumal M (2024) New species of Tropicoporus (Basidiomycota, Hymenochaetales, Hymenochaetaceae) from India, with a key to Afro-Asian Tropicoporus species. MycoKeys 102: 29-54. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.102.117067
author: Gunaseelan, Sugantha
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 5 Tropicoporus indicus (MUBL1083 holotype) A basidiomata (Holotype) B basidiome (SMK-MK2a- Isotype) C pore surface D cross-section of basidiome (arrows indicating stratified tube layers) E hymenial setae F cystidioles G–J basidiospores: G basidiospores in water H basidiospores in KOHI basidiospores in cotton blue J basidiospores in Melzer's reagent. Scale bars: 1 cm (A–D); 5 µm (E–J).
